content.en:
"What if Feng Guhe gave birth to an innate eternal life?"

Feng Gu Yuan Ancestor guessed.

"What, you mean innate eternal life?"

The True River Sword Ancestor said incredulously.

The other twelve ancestors were also shocked by this speculation, the innate eternal life is an incomparably rare life, and as soon as it makes a move, it has an eternal body, and once it becomes an adult, it is enough to be comparable to a half-step eternal realm.

Moreover, the chances of an innate eternal life breaking through to the Eternal Realm are much greater than those of a half-step Eternal Realm.

It is rumored that fifty percent of the powers of the Eternal Realm are innate eternal beings.

It can be seen from this that the innate eternal life is such an awesome existence.

The True River Sword Ancestor hurriedly asked again: "Wind Ancient Origin Ancestor, how rare is the innate eternal life, why do you have such a guess?"

Feng Gu Yuan Ancestor said: "I'm not guessing, first of all, once the innate eternal life is officially born, the movement will be very large, and it will attract many strong people, the last time the innate eternal life was born, it attracted a lot of half-step eternal realms, and even fought for this, and fell three half-step eternal realms." Eventually, an Eternal Realm power appeared and took that innate eternal life away. If the Eternal Tribulation discovered that an innate eternal life was about to be born, they would occupy the Wind Ancient River, and then transform the Wind Ancient River into the Eternal Tribulation Domain. If you pay a huge price to block the Eternal Tribulation Domain, then outsiders will not be able to enter, and they will not be able to discover the vision and movement of the birth of innate eternal life. “

The True River Sword Ancestor shook his head and said, "This is just speculation, not evidence. "

Feng Gu Yuan Ancestor smiled and said, "It's true, this is not evidence, and it doesn't even matter, but before Feng Gu River was occupied by the Eternal Tribulation Clan, a message came from the subordinates of Feng Gu River's guard, saying that a strange place had been found somewhere in Feng Gu River, and it seemed that some life was being born. I didn't pay much attention to it at the time because it was a small thing and I didn't take it seriously. Now that I think about it, could it be that the innate eternal life is being conceived, and my subordinates have no knowledge and don't know about the innate eternal life at all, so they only report to me that it is a special life. "

"If you add this information, it is really possible that it is an innate eternal life. "

True River Sword Ancestor nodded.

At this time, another Twelve Ancestors, the Beiyang Origin Ancestor, asked, "Wind Ancient Origin Ancestor, do you know the specific location of that special life?"

"I don't know!" Feng Gu Yuan Ancestor shook his head, "I didn't ask for the location because I didn't care, if I knew the location, I would have sent the Supreme One to investigate the information as soon as possible, and there was no need to guess here." "

"If there really is an innate eternal life, then the Eternal Tribulation Clan will definitely want to occupy the Fenggu River at all costs, and there are not many supreme people under our command, even if they launch a bounty mission, many supreme beings are very desperate for their lives, and they may not be desperate for that little resource. In the end, the Eternal Tribulation will suffer heavy losses, but if they get that innate eternal life, all the losses will be made up. True River Sword Ancestor said.

"What should I do then?" asked the Wind Ancient Ancestor.

They thought for a while, and one of the Twelve Ancestors, the Saint Yayuan Ancestor, proposed, "Just spread the news that Feng Guhe is very likely to have an innate eternal life, and even spread the word that your subordinates will summon you. I believe that there will be some people who believe, or even take the risk, to enter the Fenggu River, and many forces are expected to send people to find out the authenticity. In that case, the Eternal Tribulation wouldn't be able to succeed in capturing the Wind Ancient River. "

"This method is okay, I agree!" Feng Gu Yuan Ancestor immediately agreed.

And so.

Next, the Twelve Ancestors publicized the news, and it soon spread to the major forces in the Source Sea.

--------------------

Hall of Void Source.

Ye Tian also received a message from the Source God Temple, and was immediately shocked.

"Innate eternal life?"

Is this speculation reliable?

He didn't know, but if it was, it would explain why the Eternal Tribulation did it.

When Ye Tian shared the matter of innate eternal life with the Void Source Hall Instrument Spirit, the Void Source Hall Instrument Spirit revealed a piece of information.

"Master, in fact, the previous master also fell because of the innate eternal life!"

The machine spirit said.

"Didn't you say that you were chased and killed by a great enemy, and finally fell and died?"

Ye Tian wondered.

The machine spirit explained: "Actually, it was the master who snatched the innate eternal life with that great enemy, if it weren't for the master, that half-step eternal realm was afraid that he really succeeded in snatching the innate eternal life, but was stopped by the master in time. In the end, the owner was seriously injured and gave up the fight. Finally, I heard that a mysterious Eternal Realm appeared and took away the innate eternal life in an instant. The great enemy, having lost his innate eternal life, blamed his master for all his sins, and came to hunt down his master, who was healing. The master knew that he couldn't live, so he threw the Void Source Hall into a forbidden place, and began to flee himself, but in the end he was killed by the other party, but the master also hit the other party hard. "

"I see!"

Ye Tian understood.

Immediately, he asked even more curiously, "Why do you all want to snatch the innate eternal life?"

The machine spirit said: "The innate eternal life can grow to the half-step eternal realm when it is an adult, if you use special means to take away a congenital eternal life, once you succeed, you will be able to grow into a half-step eternal realm in the future, and even have a certain chance to break through to become an eternal realm! Of course, the success rate of taking away the innate eternal life is too low, and most people want to snatch the innate eternal realm. In fact, the body of the innate eternal life contains extremely high innate eternal rules, if you have an innate eternal life, you can always understand the innate eternal rules, which will be helpful for breaking through the realm and impacting the eternal realm in the future. Many forces want to seize the innate eternal life, and the goal is also to imprison it so that the supreme beings can participate in enlightenment and practice. Moreover, the Innate Eternal Crystal Nucleus of Innate Eternal Life has the effect of assisting the Nine Supreme Beings to break through the half-step Eternal Realm. "

Hearing these benefits that the machine spirit said, Ye Tian finally understood why everyone wanted an innate eternal life.

At this point, he was a little excited.

If the guess of the Source God Pavilion is true, then he has found the innate eternal life, does it mean that he can also copy the innate eternal life?

As soon as he thought of this, he immediately let his replica body probe in the Wind Ancient River in search of innate eternal life.
